items.title: Nordic Combined dropped from 2030 Winter Olympics
items.description: The 2030 Winter Olympics will be the first edition not to feature Nordic Combined after the sport was removed from the schedule due lack of competitions and public interest.

items.title: Can Scotland learn from history-making Norway?
items.description: Norway, a nation of a similar size to Scotland, are through to the World Cup quarter-finals, so can lessons be learned from their neighbours from across the North Sea?

items.title: Kombinert er ute av OL-programmet

items.title: Jæger uteblir – skaper hodebry

items.title: Danmark kjøper ikke Fifas Balogun-forklaring – ber om ny redegjørelse
items.description:
Det internasjonale fotballforbundet (Fifa) forsøkte mandag kveld å forklare hvorfor USA-spiss Folarin Baloguns karantene ble omgjort. Det lyktes de ikke med, ifølge Danmarks fotballforbund (DBU).
